name: gbrain
description: GBrain — Garry Tan's agent brain (self-wiring knowledge graph, hybrid RAG search, synthesis with citations, 50+ skills) for GitHub Copilot CLI. Requires the gbrain CLI on PATH: run scripts/install-copilot.ps1 (Windows) or scripts/install-copilot.sh (macOS/Linux), or see COPILOT.md. Original work (c) Garry Tan, MIT.
